message:
fix(tailer): respect explicit whitespace mux_socket_path as streaming disabled

When mux_socket_path is explicitly set to empty/whitespace, treat that
as "streaming disabled" rather than falling through to env/canonical
WezTerm socket auto-discovery. Fixes detect_mode_empty_socket_path_is_polling
test failure on machines with WezTerm present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
